title: Use Haiku 4.5 for smart ticket routing and triage
source: Anthropic model overview — Haiku 4.5 for classification/routing at fraction of cost
description: Replace keyword matching in auto_select_agent() with Haiku-powered smart routing. Use Haiku for plan validation. Reduces costs while improving routing accuracy.
proposed_changes: Replace auto_select_agent() with smart_select_agent() calling Haiku for JSON routing response. Use returned complexity estimate for team need detection. Add --smart-routing flag.
